variants.title: HiFi Filter FS 320 Breather Filter | Replaces the MP Filtri SAP1152CL10A0BP01
variants.description: The genuine HiFi Filter FS 320 Breather Filter is HiFi's replacement to the MP FILTRI SAP1152CL10A0BP01. Easy to install and replace, the FS 320 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
